CurrentIssues.ID: ComplexCondition:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_TEMP || responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_MOVED_PERM || responseCode == HttpURLConnection.HTTP_SEE_OTHER || responseCode == HTTP_TEMPORARY_REDIRECT || responseCode == HTTP_PERMANENT_REDIRECT
CyclomaticComplexMethod:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$suspend fun download( variant: ModelVariant = ModelVariant.autoSelect(), onProgress: (Float) -> Unit, ): Result<DownloadResult>

MaxLineLength:LocalAiRepository.kt$LocalAiRepository$"Model file appears incomplete (${file.length()} bytes, expected >$minExpectedSize). Please re-download."
MaxLineLength:ModelDownloader.kt$ModelDownloader$"[${variant.displayName}] Resuming download from byte $startByte, temp exists: ${tempFile.exists()}"
